trials.def: C: (sigma_0 n_inf) * (m dx^2 / hbar)  ambient only
D: sigma_0 n_inf (m/m_P)^2 c^2/hbar  vs  c/dx
E: tau_q * m c^2 / hbar  (cosmic-time vs Compton)

Q1_Q_parameter.note: Multiple structural definitions tested; paper/base.md does NOT specify which is canonical. Even if one passes the macro/micro split, the choice of definition is itself an extra theoretical choice (degree of freedom in formulation), so the "0 extra parameter" claim is shaky unless paper/base.md fixes the formula.

Q2_wavefunction.qualifier: INHERITED (standard QFT around Z_2 SSB vacuum)
Q2_wavefunction.note: No new quantitative prediction; rephrasing of standard QFT.

Q3_BEC_nonlocality.reason: paper/base.md replaces GFT/BEC with Z_2 SSB. Z_2 has no continuous phase, so BEC-coherence Bell narrative has no formal support in paper/base.md framework.
Q3_BEC_nonlocality.recommendation: Either (i) honestly drop Q3 from paper/base.md §14.5, or (ii) re-introduce GFT BEC layer as a 5th foundation and derive its phenomenological consequences.
